---
title: "About Us"
---

::: hero-panel
[Why This Matters]{.hero-kicker}

KAXA Space Cambodia promotes public understanding of space technologies and strengthens the local pipeline of future engineers, researchers, and innovators.
:::

:::::: grid-cards
::: theme-card
### Vision

A Cambodia where young people see science and space technology as an achievable path.
:::

::: theme-card
### Approach

Bridge inspiration and practical education through consistent content and events.
:::

::: theme-card
### Partnerships

Collaborate with universities, labs, and international professionals to scale impact.
:::
::::::

::::: hero-panel
[Our Global Members Map]{.hero-kicker}

Click any pin to view member profile details.

:::: member-map-wrap
::: {#member-map role="region" aria-label="KAXA member locations map"}
:::
::::

```{=html}
<link
  rel="stylesheet"
  href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"
  integrity="sha256-p4NxAoJBhIIN+hmNHrzRCf9tD/miZyoHS5obTRR9BMY="
  crossorigin=""
>
```

```{=html}
<script
  src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"
  integrity="sha256-20nQCchB9co0qIjJZRGuk2/Z9VM+kNiyxNV1lvTlZBo="
  crossorigin=""
></script>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  if (typeof L === "undefined") return;

  const mapEl = document.getElementById("member-map");
  if (!mapEl) return;

  const map = L.map("member-map", {
    scrollWheelZoom: false,
    worldCopyJump: true,
    zoomControl: false
  }).setView([16, 110], 3);

  L.tileLayer("https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_nolabels/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png", {
    maxZoom: 6,
    minZoom: 2,
    attribution: "&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors &copy; CARTO"
  }).addTo(map);

  const members = [
    {
      name: "Mr. Tim Hoksong",
      title: "Researcher",
      summary: "MSc in Space Systems Engineering. Focused on engineering research and local capacity building.",
      location: "Institute of Technology of Cambodia, Phnom Penh, Cambodia",
      lat: 11.5686,
      lng: 104.8909,
      photo: "https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Tim+Hoksong&background=1f5cff&color=fff&size=160&bold=true"
    },
    {
      name: "Mr. Ly Pechvattana",
      title: "Industrial Engineer Officer",
      summary: "BS in Robotics and Automation Engineering. Works on robotics development in industry.",
      location: "DENSO Cambodia, Phnom Penh, Cambodia",
      lat: 11.5564,
      lng: 104.9282,
      photo: "https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Ly+Pechvattana&background=00a3ff&color=fff&size=160&bold=true"
    },
    {
      name: "Mr. Him Vanthong",
      title: "Master Student",
      summary: "Currently studying aserospace engineering at University of Ulsan",
      location: "Ulsan, South Korea",
      lat: 36.0133,
      lng: 129.3239,
      photo: "https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Him+Vanthong&background=4756ff&color=fff&size=160&bold=true"
    }
  ];

  const countryGroups = [
    {
      country: "Cambodia",
      lat: 12.8,
      lng: 104.9,
      members: members.filter((m) => m.location.includes("Cambodia"))
    },
    {
      country: "South Korea",
      lat: 36.4,
      lng: 127.9,
      members: members.filter((m) => m.location.includes("South Korea"))
    }
  ];

  countryGroups.forEach((group) => {
    const listHtml = group.members.map((member) => `
      <div class="member-item">
        <img src="${member.photo}" alt="Profile image of ${member.name}" class="member-avatar">
        <div class="member-meta">
          <h4>${member.name}</h4>
          <p class="member-title">${member.title}</p>
          <p>${member.summary}</p>
          <p class="member-location">${member.location}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    `).join("");

    const popup = `
      <div class="country-popup">
        <h4>${group.country} <span class="country-count">${group.members.length}</span></h4>
        <div class="member-list">${listHtml}</div>
      </div>
    `;

    const icon = L.divIcon({
      className: "country-dot-wrap",
      html: `<span class="country-dot">${group.members.length}</span>`,
      iconSize: [30, 30],
      iconAnchor: [15, 15]
    });

    L.marker([group.lat, group.lng], { icon }).addTo(map).bindPopup(popup, {
      maxWidth: 320
    });
  });
});
</script>
```
:::::
